results.trackName: Petty Heart: A Feel Good Sports Romance Novella
results.description:
Twenty years of rivalry. One season to ruin everything.

Emma Porter has hated Scott Davidson since kindergarten. The spelling bees. The science fairs. The three hundred googly eyes on everything she owned.

So when he starts staring at her like she's someone he actually wants? She knows he's planning something big.

Scott has a problem. His childhood nemesis showed up to a party in a black dress, and his brain hasn't worked since. Now he can't stop noticing her, especially when she starts showing up to his hockey games, screaming about interference calls and learning plays faster than his freshmen.

Worse? He plays like a future first-round pick every time she's watching.

She's 5'2". He's 6'3". She's the one problem he can't solve. He's the one variable she can't control.

When sixteen years of rivalry collide with the kind of tension that makes it hard to breathe, the line between hate and something else was never a line at all.

It was a dare.

Petty Hearts is a closed-door hockey romance featuring rivals-to-lovers, a heroine who will fight you (and lose, because she's tiny), and enough competitive bickering to fill a penalty box.

Alpha Athletes. Total Devotion. Closed Doors.
results.trackCensoredName: Petty Heart: A Feel Good Sports Romance Novella
